human_message: Accounts read-only admission closes RED because the repo design gate is not truthfully earned and the master plan still places execution-core repair before basic companion UI.

supporting_facts.agents_design_gate_rule: rich UI expansion remains blocked until the gate token is truthfully earned
supporting_facts.master_plan_ordering: execution-core repair, reserve-first stage-20 re-entry, post-advance same-day validation, then canonical stop before basic companion UI
supporting_facts.ui_readiness_account_truth: Account Pool screen must read account state from accounts list --json
